recommendations.title: Stargirl
recommendations.overview: An unassuming high schooler finds himself inexplicably drawn to the free-spirited new girl, whose unconventional ways change how they see themselves…and their world.

recommendations.title: I'm Your Woman
recommendations.overview: A woman is forced to go on the run after her husband betrays his partners, sending her and her baby on a dangerous journey.

recommendations.title: Fast Color
recommendations.overview: A woman is forced to go on the run when her superhuman abilities are discovered. Years after having abandoned her family, the only place she has left to hide is home.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
recommendations.overview: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, 1991. High school freshman Charlie is a wallflower, always watching life from the sidelines, until two senior students, Sam and her stepbrother Patrick, become his mentors, helping him discover the joys of friendship, music

recommendations.title: Freedom Writers
recommendations.overview: A young teacher inspires her class of at-risk students to learn tolerance, apply themselves, and pursue education beyond high school.

recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: Family Weekend
recommendations.overview: A 16-year-old girl takes her parents hostage after they miss her big jump-roping competition.

recommendations.title: Only the Strong

recommendations.title: Lessons of a Dream
recommendations.overview: An English teacher brings soccer to a German school in the 19th Century.
